name: Compuware Corporation
description: Compuware Corporation is a leading software company that provides mainframe application development, testing, and performance management software. The company's products and services enable IT organizations to optimize the performance, reliability, and security of their mainframe systems, helping them to accelerate digital transformation and deliver high-quality software faster. Founded in 1973 and headquartered in Detroit, Michigan, Compuware was acquired by BMC Software in 2020.
